description: Product Description Traits: 1. The material is safe, don't worry about affecting the baby's growth 2. The size of the teether fits the baby's palm and is easy to hold 3. The L-shaped teether helps babies develop good hygiene habits against tooth decay 4. Easy to clean, and residual harmful substances can be removed instantly Fruit Shape Cute fruit shapes can attract children's attention, and babies like bright colors and fruity shapes to soothe their emotions. Corn Toothbrush 2 corn-shaped toothbrushes with soft brush heads. Can help children clean their teeth.
